name: Date-Oatmeal Bars
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F. Grease a 9x9x2 inch square pan.
2. In a saucepan, simmer the dates, water, and sugar uncovered for 7-10 minutes until thick. Cool.
3. Sift flour and salt together. Add brown sugar. Using a pastry blender, cut in margarine until the mixture is the size of small peas. Mix in oatmeal.
4. Spread half the mixture into the bottom of the pan. Top with the date mixture. Add remaining oatmeal mixture to form the top layer.
5. Bake for 45-50 minutes until golden on top. Cool upright in the pan on a wire rack, then cut into bars.
